generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures hoist swinging motion"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AnemometerDataTransmitted
]

instance CartMotorStepper : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling cart movement"
]

instance HoistMotorStepper : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Stepper motor controlling hoist movement"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup at the end of the hoist"
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance AnemometerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance HoistSwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of hoist swing angle measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time-series data of wind speed measurements"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AnemometerDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance TrajectoryExecutionLogData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Logs of trajectory execution details"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance SimulationResultData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Results from crane simulation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D CAD model of gantry crane system created in Autodesk Fusion360"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Fusion360Enabler
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model for trajectory generation of the crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantrylibEnabler
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization of validation results and trajectory traces"
]

instance AlertInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Fault alerts triggered by continuous validation"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Optimal trajectory generation for control decisions to minimize residual swinging"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationResultInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulation results used for validation and analysis"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data storage for analysis and reporting"
]

instance CommunicationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Inter-service communication via MQTT protocol"
]

instance DatabaseService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB for historical data storage"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Grafana-based dashboard for visualization of validation results and trajectory traces"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Kinematic model-based optimal trajectory generation"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of crane dynamics and controller behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationResultInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time comparison of measurements vs simulations with threshold alerts"
    DTDFVocab:provides AlertInsight
]

instance MQTTBrokerService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for communication between services"
    DTDFVocab:provides CommunicationInsight
]

instance DockerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization for service orchestration using docker-compose"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for storing sensor readings and simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:enables DatabaseService
]

instance GrafanaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization tool for dashboarding sensor data and validation results"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker for inter-service communication"
    DTDFVocab:enables MQTTBrokerService
]

instance GantrylibEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python module for gantry crane control and simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance Fusion360Enabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "CAD modeling tool for crane component design"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance CapellaEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Arcadia modeling tool for system architecture design"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Centralized digital twin system on a personal computer"
    base:contains DatabaseService, DashboardService, TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService, ContinuousValidationService, MQTTBrokerService, SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, CartMotorStepper, HoistMotorStepper, Electromagnet, CADModel, KinematicModel, HoistSwingAngleData, WindSpeedData, TrajectoryExecutionLogData, SimulationResultData, SwingAngleDataTransmitted, AnemometerDataTransmitted, DockerEnabler, TimescaleDBEnabler, GrafanaEnabler, MQTTBrokerEnabler, GantrylibEnabler, Fusion360Enabler, CapellaEnabler, VisualizationInsight, AlertInsight, OptimalTrajectoryAction, SimulationResultInsight, HistoricalDataInsight, CommunicationInsight
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Optimal movement trajectories generated by the Trajectory Generator Service are sent to the physical crane via the Control Application's Python interface, which interfaces with the motor controllers."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization with real-time data processing; Continuous Validation Service operates in real-time, comparing executed trajectories against simulations with immediate threshold checks."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Centralized architecture where physical crane components interact with digital services via MQTT and database; all digital components run on a single PC, orchestrated through Docker containers and Python modules."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Designed phase (CAD models in Autodesk Fusion360) and operated phase (real-time monitoring, validation, and control during crane operation)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Continuous Validation Service calculates distance metrics between measured trajectories and simulations; thresholds determine validity, with breaches triggering operator notifications via the dashboard; model validation techniques reused from prior research."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol (Eclipse Mosquitto broker) for real-time communication between physical crane interface and digital services; data logged to TimescaleDB for persistent storage."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All digital components containerized via Docker; deployed on a single personal computer using docker-compose for orchestration; no cloud infrastructure used."
]
